case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS JOHN L. ARMSTRONG

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN L. ARMSTRONG $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,532.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

TRIAL RESET TO JAN-08-1988 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF OCT-30-1987 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JUN-24-1996, GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN L. ARMSTRONG
$50 PER MONTH TO BE WITHHELD FROM DEBTOR ARMSTRONG'S EARNINGS.
